DEPLOYMENT_ENV.description: Logical environment label surfaced in Datadog logs (resource.deployment.environment) and Sentry events

OAUTH2_PROXY_REDIRECT_URL.description: OAuth callback URL for the review app. %URL% expands to this PR's own domain (autometa-staging-prXXX.osc-fr1.scalingo.io) instead of inheriting staging's, so login redirects back to the review app
